design_philosophy: Minimalist, block-based system inspired by Notion and Todoist. Designed for rapid capture, frictionless AI organization, and absolute clarity. Function dictates form.

components.button_primary: bg-black text-white rounded-2xl py-4 px-6 font-bold flex-row justify-center items-center active:opacity-80
components.button_secondary: bg-gray-100 text-black rounded-2xl py-4 px-6 font-semibold flex-row justify-center items-center active:bg-gray-200
components.fab_quick_add: absolute bottom-6 right-6 bg-black rounded-full w-16 h-16 items-center justify-center shadow-lg active:scale-95
components.card: bg-white border border-gray-100 rounded-2xl p-4 shadow-sm
components.card_urgent: bg-red-50 border border-red-200 rounded-2xl p-4 shadow-sm
components.input_field: bg-gray-50 border border-gray-200 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-base text-black focus:border-black focus:bg-white
components.badge_urgent: bg-red-500 rounded-md px-2 py-1 flex-row items-center

interactions_and_motion.active_states: All Pressable/TouchableOpacity elements must have visual feedback (opacity 0.8 on active, or scale down to 0.98).
interactions_and_motion.haptics: Use haptic feedback for significant actions: marking task done, deleting, confirming photo.
interactions_and_motion.transitions: Use bottom sheets for secondary actions (filters, photo picker). Use LayoutAnimation for list items entering/leaving.

assets_and_icons.usage: Use outlined styles (e.g., 'camera-outline', 'document-text-outline') for inactive/default, filled for active.

testing.test_id_rule: Every interactive component (Pressable, TouchableOpacity, TextInput, Button) MUST include a 'testID' (React Native) or 'data-testid' prop using kebab-case role-based naming (e.g., 'add-note-button', 'search-input', 'urgent-tab').

sections: Urgences du jour: Horizontal scroll of urgent cards (Red badges, distinct UI).
Rappels à venir: Vertical list, smart dates highlighted.
Tâches (À faire / En retard): Quick checklist UI.
Quick Actions: Floating Action Button (FAB) for instant note/camera.
Action row: Camera Icon (Photo), Gallery Icon, Microphone.
Top: AI assigned Category Badge + Urgent toggle.
Body: Extracted OCR text / structured data (Dates, amounts, entities).
Task Management: Segmented control for (À faire / En cours / Fait).

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly use React Native components (View, Text, ScrollView, Pressable, TextInput) compatible with Expo.
Avoid web HTML elements like div, span, or button.
Implement styling using React Native StyleSheet or NativeWind/Tailwind. Do not use generic CSS.
Ensure UI is thumb-friendly on mobile with large touch targets (minimum 44x44 points).
Integrate the URGENT visual language (Red #FF3B30) cleanly without overwhelming the user.
All text must be legible against its background following APCA/WCAG standards.
Make sure every interactive element has a valid 'testID' property for automation.
Assume French for all UI copy (e.g., 'Rechercher', 'Nouvelle note', 'Enregistrer').
